intro: APT41, Omnistealer, and SideWinder were the most prominent threat actors in credential-theft incidents between April 12 and April 23, 2026, with 16 articles covering the topic. The high-severity attacks primarily targeted technology, software development, cloud services, and government sectors globally, with specific reports from Bangladesh, Europe, North America, and South Asia. CVE-2026-33829 was the top vulnerability exploited, and the severity mix included 3 critical and 11 high-severity incidents.
